description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a mix of dark wood-textured exterior walls and white horizontal surfaces. The structure is composed of multiple rectangular volumes, creating a staggered, multi-level appearance. Large windows are placed asymmetrically on the front and sides, allowing natural light into the interior rooms, which are partially visible and include distinct color schemes. The main entryway is marked by double doors with glass panels, set beneath a small overhang. The roofline is predominantly flat, with some sections extending outward to form partial terraces or ledges. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat roof, dark wood-textured exterior, and asymmetrical windows. The design features clean lines, multiple levels, and a prominent glass-paneled entryway.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway with double glass-paneled doors, two windows, and the staggered, multi-level facade with dark wood paneling.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a large window, a visible interior room with a TV, and the layered structure of the house.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mostly solid wood-textured wall with minimal window openings and the flat roof sections.
description_view_3: This side view reveals a windowed room with light-colored walls and a glimpse of interior furnishings, as well as the stepped roofline.
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass-paneled doors beneath a small overhang, no porch or columns, minimalist style
